# Regression test: AbstractOneWay annotation survives a stall_depth
# stretch. The abstract edge handle is (region, from=(-3,2), to=(-3,3))
# — one parallel-aisle segment along aisle -3, from cross aisle 2 up to
# cross aisle 3. When stall_depth grows the parallel aisle slides to a
# new world x; the annotation still resolves because it's keyed by
# integer grid indices.

polygon outer
0,0
400,0
400,300
0,300
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stalls_per_face=4
----
set stalls_per_face=4

debug use_abstract_stamp=true
----
debug use_abstract_stamp=true

# Baseline (no annotation).
generate
----
total_stalls: 162

annotation abstract-one-way region=0x1000000000000 from=-3,2 to=-3,3
----
annotation abstract-one-way region=0x0001000000000000 from=-3,2 to=-3,3

generate
----
total_stalls: 162

# Stretch. The target edge moves in world space but its abstract
# index is unchanged, so the one-way direction should still apply
# after the parameter change.
set stall_depth=22
----
set stall_depth=22

generate
----
total_stalls: 162

screenshot
----
